children.heading: Establishment and alteration
children.label: a Establishment and alteration
children.text: The President shall establish convenient internal revenue districts for the purpose of administering the internal revenue laws. The President may from time to time alter such districts.

children.heading: Boundaries
children.label: b Boundaries
children.text: For the purpose mentioned in subsection (a), the President may subdivide any State, or the District of Columbia, or may unite into one district two or more States.
